title: balanops vieillardii
intro: Balanops vieillardii, also known as the Borneo ironwood, is a tropical tree species native to the island of Borneo. The medicinal properties of Balanops vieillardii lie in its timber, which is valued for its durability and resistance to rot, as well as its seeds, which contain a high concentration of tannins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Balanops vieillardii are attributed to its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against infections and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Balanops vieillardii may include extracts of the seeds and timber, which can be used to make traditional medicines, such as tinctures and infusions, to treat various health conditions.
